message:
🐛 Fix doubled path in Prow Artifacts URL

Fixes #106

The gcs_browser_prefix was set to include `/prow-logs/` but Prow also
appends the bucket name from the GCS configuration, resulting in doubled
paths like `prow-logs/prow-logs/logs/...`.

This fix removes the `/prow-logs/` suffix so the final URL becomes:
`https://gcsweb.kubestellar.io/prow-logs/logs/...` (correct)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -61,7 +61,7 @@ sinker:
 
 deck:
   spyglass:
-    gcs_browser_prefix: "https://gcsweb.kubestellar.io/prow-logs/"
+    gcs_browser_prefix: "https://gcsweb.kubestellar.io/s3/"
     lenses:
       - required_files:
           - ^(?:started|finished)\.json$
